name: RMR GROUP INC.
business: The RMR Group Inc. is a holding company that, through its subsidiary The RMR Group LLC, provides management services to real estate investment trusts and other real estate clients. Its services include business management, property management, construction supervision, and advisory services to managed equity REITs, private capital clients, and advisory clients.

exposures.sentence: ILPT (Nasdaq: ILPT) owns and leases industrial and logistics properties.

RMR Residential provides management services to properties owned by third parties, to four funds and joint ventures with institutional partners through its property management and investment management agreements.
a construction supervision fee equal to 5.0% of the cost of any construction, renovation or repair activities at the Managed Equity REIT's properties, other than ordinary maintenance and repairs

We anticipate emissions reductions will occur through a combination of strategic capital investments in energy efficiency by the Managed Equity REITs and certain of our Private Capital Clients, stakeholder engagement to promote sustainable behavior, the deployment of on-site solar and the purchase of energy from renewable sources.

catalysts.event: Wind down of AlerisLife business and operations
catalysts.sentence: On September 3, 2025, AlerisLife announced that it had entered into agreements to transition the management of its senior living communities to third party operators and expects to sell all of its assets and wind down its business and operations by June 30, 2026.

catalysts.event: Sale of two floating rate first mortgage loans to SEVN
catalysts.sentence: On October 29, 2025, we authorized the sale of our two floating rate first mortgage loans secured by properties in Revere, MA and Wayne, PA to SEVN. We expect to close on the sale of these loans by year-end and terminate our secured financing facility.

catalysts.event: New management agreements with OPI to take effect upon effectiveness of OPI's plan of reorganization
catalysts.sentence: In connection with the OPI chapter 11 cases, on October 30, 2025, RMR LLC, in its capacity as manager of OPI, entered into a restructuring support agreement with OPI, certain of OPI's lenders and certain of OPI's subsidiaries. Pursuant to the restructuring support agreement, RMR LLC agreed to terms for a new business management agreement and a new property management agreement with OPI, as set forth in the management agreement term sheet attached to the restructuring support agreement, which agreements are expected to take effect upon the effectiveness of OPI's plan of reorganization.
